title: 主题风格生成
description: 触发：需要处理与主题风格生成相关的任务时 | 目标：To apply consistent, professional styling to presentation sl | 步骤：After a preferred theme is selected:；Read the corresponding theme file from the `themes/` directory；Apply the specified colors and fonts consistently throughout the deck | 产出：结构化结果
trigger: 需要处理与主题风格生成相关的任务时
goal: To apply consistent, professional styling to presentation sl
steps: After a preferred theme is selected:
Read the corresponding theme file from the `themes/` directory
Apply the specified colors and fonts consistently throughout the deck
